findings.note: build_graph_node_edge_count asserts both node count (5) and edge count (5) for a concrete fixture. Test fails if from_describe_model drops any node category or miscounts edges.

related_measures_depth_and_missing verifies: depth-1 neighbors include revenue/cost/margin (undirected), depth-2 from revenue reaches margin, ascending distance ordering, missing start returns empty vec.

causal_paths_structural_evidence verifies: non-empty result for measure with derivation edges, evidence_type=Structural on every path, each step uses DerivesFrom or FiltersBy, ascending length sort, empty for leaf, empty for unknown.
suggest_next_questions_neighbors: with partial context {revenue}, profit is suggested; with full context suggestions are empty. Context nodes excluded from suggestions.
serde_roundtrip exercises ConceptGraphSnapshot, RelatedMeasure, CausalPath, NextQuestion, EdgeKind, EvidenceType, PathStep. Node+edge counts match after round-trip via ConceptGraph::from_snapshot.
